svg.title: Recruitment agent — compact view
svg.desc: Same components as the detailed diagram, trimmed to one-line descriptions per box. Five stages + outcomes + nightly learning loop, with orchestrator and Graphiti bands on either side and two feedback loops.
svg.text: Same components as the full diagram, one line per box. Orchestrator drives every stage; Graphiti is the shared substrate. Two feedback loops close the cycle.
STAGE -1 · PRE-BASELINE — one-shot backfill before the live cycle

g.text: Recruiter-touched historical candidates (technical_interview / offer / hired) are re-scored to seed Graphiti so graph_priors has signal on day one.
Receives prompt overlay (intent + past teach events).
Rule-driven decision: send a task, skip if existing artifacts cover it, or request artifacts when no calibrated template fits.
Sonnet · grades the candidate's submitted task against the role's rubric. Fires only if a task was sent.

svg.text: STAGE 4 · POLICY COMPOSITION — the four-way decision

g.text: Deterministic logistic regression with hierarchical pooling. Abstains when sub-agents disagree or confidence is low.

svg.text: STAGE 5 · RECRUITER REVIEW — primary HITL gate

g.text: Recruiter sees the recommendation + evidence and picks one. No action fires without this.
Override + Teach write to the exemplar store — fed into the next score (see overlay arrow).
Single path through which actions fire: advance_stage · reject_application · send_assessment · request_candidate_artifacts.

svg.text: REALISED OUTCOMES — feed the learning loop

g.text: reached_interview · received_offer · hired · rejected_late. Written to Graphiti for the nightly fitter.

svg.text: NIGHTLY LEARNING LOOP — promotion requires HITL co-sign
